questions.text: What is the role of the down-projection layer W_down in a bottleneck adapter?
options: To project activations into a low-dimensional bottleneck space, reducing parameter counts.
questions.correct_answer: To project activations into a low-dimensional bottleneck space, reducing parameter counts.
questions.explanation: W_down projects the model activations (dimension d) to a smaller bottleneck size (m), minimizing parameter counts.
